name: @absolutejs/sync-pack-mentions
description: @mention parser pack for @absolutejs/sync — extracts @usernames from a body, writes per-actor mention rows, fires an onMention hook that composes with the notifications pack
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --sourcemap --target=bun --external @absolutejs/sync && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.release: bun run format && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && bun publish
